content.en:
Ye Tian found a spare place here to sit cross-legged, silently contemplating the sword aura here.

The aura of the kendo here also seems to be touched but cannot really be captured, and only the will of eternity can feel a little bit of the aura of the sword, so for many eternal realms, without a long period of enlightenment, they can't get much benefit at all.

Therefore, many eternal realms send a doppelganger or ontology here to meditate, so that their cultivation will not be delayed.

Those eternal realms without doppelgangers have no time to waste here.

Compared with other Eternal Realms, Ye Tian's biggest advantage is talent, his talent far surpasses that of other Eternal Realms, and there are even Legendary Ancestors, while the Six Legendary Lords do not have Legendary Ancestors.

Therefore, Ye Tian was able to use this sword to gain more benefits, and the speed of comprehension was faster, far from being comparable to other Eternal Realm Lords.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian's replica body was cultivated here.

For him, there is no doubt that the current replica body and the main body are improved, and the improvement of one body is equivalent to the improvement of other bodies.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian 21 continued to comprehend the sword aura here, and gradually gained something, combined with the stacking secret technique and other eternal compression secret techniques, and then according to his own situation, he slowly tried to create a higher level of eternal compression secret techniques.

Although there was a limit to the half-step Eternal Power compression, Ye Tian had not yet reached the limit, far from reaching the limit.

"The kendo aura here is too terrifying, just feeling a little bit, it's like seeing another level of the world, if you feel this kendo aura in case, it's enough to benefit a lot!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

As the years passed, Ye Tian gradually created a good secret technique of eternal compression.

This Eternal Compression Secret Technique is to imitate the sword path aura here, and compress the half-step eternal power inside the body with a similar sword path breath, so the compression effect is far beyond the stacked secret technique.

At the beginning, this secret technique was only a prototype, but it was gradually perfected by Ye Tian.

And in the process of perfecting, Ye Tian shattered his body many times, but the result was still perfected.

He named this Eternal Compression Secret Technique Sword Pressing Secret Technique.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, the Sword Pressing Secret Technique can compress the half-step eternal power by about 200 times, and he estimates that 200 times is still not the limit, but with his current attainment, it can only be created to this extent.

Unless he spent an endless long time creating a better Eternal Compression Mystic, it wasn't necessary.

After the Sword Pressing Secret Technique was created, Ye Tian's body began to cultivate the Sword Pressing Secret Technique, compressing the half-step eternal power in his body. ヤん�!!�牜

An illusory sword shadow appeared above Ye's head, and projected countless particles inside his body, and those half-step eternal powers seemed to be suppressed by endless sword shadows, just like a ball of water being compressed into a drop of water. 饤.clickclick!!

The half-step eternal power in the body was suppressed and compressed by the sword shadow, and it constantly caused qualitative changes in a special way, turning into a more condensed half-step eternal power.

In such a process, Ye Tian's body was also under unimaginable pressure.

However, Ye Tian had already perfected this secret technique, so most of this pressure was only for the half-step eternal power, and the burden on the body was not very large, it could be tolerated, and even had a certain effect of refining the body.

After a long time, the condensation degree of the half-step eternal power in Ye Tian's body reached a very strong level.

90 times!

95 times!

100 times!

105 times!

......

When the half-step eternal power was compressed to more than 120 times, the speed was much slower, but after nearly 100 eternal years, Ye Tian's half-step eternal power was still compressed to 150 times, and at this time, the sword pressing secret technique was also perfected by him to the extent that it could finally be compressed by 220 times.

The half-step eternal power was compressed to this extent, which made Ye Tian's strength increase a lot.

But Ye Tian knew very well that even so, his strength had not reached a qualitative change, and it was still a little difficult to break through the eleventh layer of the True Legend Tower.

Soon after, he went to try it out.

As a result, it was still a pity, and there was still some gap between breaking through the eleventh layer, and these gaps were difficult to cross by compressing the half-step eternal power in the body.

At this time, Ye Tian thought of the Will Eternal Technique.

His will is actually very strong, and now he has opened up more than 30,000 will worlds, which are relatively powerful among the third-order eternal wills.

But the will is strong, but without an eternal will technique, it is difficult to give full play to the advantages of the will.

"If I can create a Will Eternal Technique, my strength will inevitably be transformed!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian chatted with the Stargazing Sword Ancestor about the knowledge of the Will Eternal Technique.

"Stargazing Sword Ancestor, what do you think of the Will Eternal Technique?"

Ye Tian asked.

"It's very powerful, and the potential is unlimited!" commented the Stargazing Sword Ancestor.

"Do you think we have any hope of creating the Will Eternal Technique?" Ye Tian asked again.

"It's too difficult!" the Stargazing Sword Ancestor shook his head, "I know that the Endless Ancestor would really like to create a Will Eternal Technique, and so do I, as do other Eternal Realms above the Immortal Realm, even the Six Legendary Lords, but, for countless eternity, everyone has failed. "

"Didn't any of them succeed?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Stargazing Sword 443 Ancestor shook his head and said, "As far as I know, no. There is no legend that the Eternal Realm in the Tower will have the Will Eternal Technique, but there is no inheritance of the Will Eternal Technique, and we can't create the Will Eternal Technique by ourselves only by fighting those Eternal Realms. It can even be said that the Will Eternal Technique is a system that is incompatible with our cultivation system, and we don't even have the inheritance of the entry, how can we create it?"

Immediately, he added, "There may be an eternal realm created, but it will not be spoken." However, there is an eternal realm that has put forward such a speculation, and the fusion of will and innate eternal rules is the basic condition for the creation of the will eternal technique. But our half-step Eternal Realm needs to fuse the Innate Eternal Rules with the body in order to break through to the Eternal Realm, and the Immortal Realm Lord needs to fuse the body with the will in order to become the Immortal Realm or even the Legendary Lord, and there is never a need to fuse the will with the Innate Eternal Rules. In addition, the fusion of the innate eternal rules with the will is too dangerous, and if you are not careful, it will cause the will to collapse. I think that there is no way to fuse the will with the innate eternal rules, this is a path that cannot be taken, and no one dares to try. "

"Will fused with innate eternal rules?"

When Ye Tian heard this, he suddenly felt that this might be the right path, but no one dared to take it. _
